providers.name: Josh Dobstaff, MD
providers.bio: Board-certified physician and hospitalist with over a decade of experience. Specializes in medical weight loss, hormone optimization, and regenerative health.

providers.name: Allie Vivirito, RN, BSN
providers.bio: Healthcare leader with over 16 years of nursing experience. Degrees from Virginia Tech and Johns Hopkins. Passionate about reducing barriers to wellness.

providers.name: Samantha Danesi, PA-C, LMT
providers.bio: Board-certified PA with over 17 years of experience in aesthetic medicine, plastic surgery, and dermatology. Known for artful, natural-looking injectable results.

providers.name: Holly Meehan, RN, BSN
providers.bio: Certified nurse injector with a background in orthopedic and reconstructive plastic surgery at UNC. Works closely with each client to meet their individual goals.

providers.name: Kristin Timpy, MSN, APRN, IFMCP
providers.bio: Board-certified nurse practitioner with nearly two decades of experience in cardiology, family medicine, and functional medicine. Institute for Functional Medicine certified provider.

providers.name: Brittany Duval
providers.bio: Licensed aesthetician with over a decade of experience specializing in chemical peels, microneedling, and customized facials.
